flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at College of Marin rose 36% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.8k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at College of Marin rose 28% between 2007 and 2010 ($636 → $816).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at College of Marin rose 166% between 2007 and 2010 (2.4k → 6.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at College of Marin fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (9.7% → 0.0%).
